title: Policy Recommendations for Mandatory qPCR Testing in Meat Supply Chain
author: Sophian, Alfi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The   integrity     of     the     meat     supply     chain     is     crucial     for     food     safety  ,   consumer     trust  ,   and     international     trade     compliance  .   Conventional     methods     for     detecting     adulteration     and     verifying     species     origin   are   often     slow     and     prone     to     errors  . Real-  time   PCR (  qPCR  )   offers     rapid  ,   accurate  ,   and     sensitive     detection     of     animal     species  ,   enabling     timely     intervention     against     fraud     and     contamination  .   Implementing     mandatory     qPCR   testing   across     the     meat     supply     chain     would     standardize     quality     control  ,   minimize     the     risk     of     mislabeling  ,   and     enhance     traceability     from     production     to   retail.   This     policy     brief     highlights     the     need     for     regulatory     frameworks  ,   laboratory     capacity     building  ,   and     standardized     protocols     to     ensure     reliable     authentication  ,   strengthen     consumer     confidence  ,   and     safeguard     both     domestic     and     export     markets     against     economic     and     reputational     losses  .
